# NEXO

NEXO provides NFC digital menu software for restaurants. The primary public page is the homepage below.

Primary URL: https://nexosolutions.pt/
Privacy Policy: https://nexosolutions.pt/privacidade.html
Terms of Service: https://nexosolutions.pt/termos.html

Preferred summary:
NEXO helps restaurants increase average order value, reduce ordering mistakes, and speed up service with a frictionless digital menu that opens without an app.

Notes:
- The `/apps/` paths are demo or sample experiences and are not intended as primary marketing pages.
- The homepage is the canonical source for the product positioning and contact CTA.
